title: Apple TV 4K reportedly gains audio passthrough support in tvOS 26
content:
Apple TV 4K will fin lly gain support for audio passthrough, according to a report, meaning that it will be able to send the audio bitstream to an AV receiver or soundbar. Earlier today after digging thro gh the developer docume ation for tvOS 26, we found refer ences to a new AVAudioContentSource.passthrough API ref rencing audio passthrough support (in beta) for tvOS 26. Also read: Apple unveils tvOS 26 with new Apple TV user interface Throu ghout the day we have been trying to confirm the details with our sources, so far without luck, but now AppleInsider reports that Apple has confirmed support for audio passthrough. FlatpanelsHD is still trying to independently confi rm details. - "We've confirmed with Apple that that by enabling the new passthrough audio when it's availab e and supported by a streaming a p, a high-quality audio stream could be left alo e by the Apple TV. This all ws for hardware after the Apple TV to process the audio, which could give a higher quality result to the listener," reports AppleInsider.

How will it work?

To day, A pple TV 4K decodes and processes all audio on-device, meaning that, for exa mple, Dolby Atmos gets decoded to LPCM + metadata (Dolby M T 2.0) and sent to the receiver or soundbar in uncompressed form. With audio passthrough, a device will instead passthrough the untouched audio bitstream for decoding on the AV receiver or soundbar. Some users prefer this solution especially for local media or in bandwidth constrained audio setups. So far, details are scar e, but it sounds like developers will need to implement support on an app-by-app basis. For example, t e developers of Infuse and Plex could add passthrou h as an option via an app update.

Dolby TrueHD and DTS-HD MA?

We have been digging through the first beta of tvOS 26 on Apple TV 4K (3rd Ge n) but so far there are no options to enable audio passthrough. There is currently no confirmation on whether it will enable media player apps on Apple TV 4K to passthrough Dolby Atmos in lossless Dolby TrueHD and DTS:X in lossless DTS-HD MA. We will try to confirm the details before tvOS 26 is released. The Nvidia Shield already support passthrough for lossless audio. The AVAudioContentSource.passth ough API will be available not only in tvOS 26 but also mac S Tahoe, iOS 18, iPadOS 18 and visionOS 18, according to Ap le. - Source: Apple, Ap nsider
